title: Hornet Removal Upper West Side | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal in Upper West Side, Manhattan. Safe, effective hornet nest elimination for $350-$550. Same-day service available. Call now for a free quote!
intro: Hornets nesting near your Upper West Side brownstone or pre-war building can pose serious risks to your family and neighbors. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, professional hornet removal services throughout the Upper West Side, from Riverside Park to Central Park West. Our licensed technicians safely eliminate hornet nests and prevent future infestations at competitive prices.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Upper West Side residents and property managers for years with guaranteed hornet removal services. Our technicians are familiar with the unique architecture of Upper West Side buildings—from historic brownstones to modern high-rises—and use safe, effective methods that protect both your property and the environment.
localContext: The tree-lined streets and proximity to both Riverside and Central Parks make the Upper West Side particularly attractive to hornets seeking nesting sites. The neighborhood's mix of classic pre-war buildings, brownstones, and modern residences requires specialized pest control approaches that respect architectural integrity while ensuring complete hornet elimination.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in the Upper West Side?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day hornet removal services throughout the Upper West Side. Our team can typically arrive within 2-4 hours for emergency situations. Once on-site, most hornet nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, depending on nest location and size.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal price?
faqs.answer: Our hornet removal service includes a thorough inspection, complete nest removal, treatment of the affected area to eliminate remaining hornets, disposal of the nest, and preventive recommendations. The price varies based on nest size, location accessibility, and building height. We provide free quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are hornet removal treatments safe for Upper West Side apartment buildings and families?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for residential buildings, children, and pets. Our technicians are trained to work in multi-unit buildings and take extra precautions in densely populated areas. We coordinate with building management when necessary and ensure all residents are informed of safety protocols.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have hornets versus wasps or bees in my Upper West Side property?
faqs.answer: Hornets are larger than typical wasps, often reaching 1.5 inches in length, with thick bodies and distinctive white or yellow markings. Their nests are usually gray, papery, and football-shaped, often found in trees, eaves, or attics. If you're unsure, our technicians provide free identification during the inspection—never attempt to approach a nest yourself, as hornets are aggressive when threatened.
